kana: つとめます［かいしゃに～］

meaning_en: be, go, come (respectful equivalent of います, いきます and きます)
eat, drink (respectful equivalent of たべます and のみます)
say, (one's name) is ～ (respectful equivalent of いいます)

kana: ごらんに なります
meaning_en: see, look at (respectful equivalent of みます)
know (respectful equivalent of しっています)
(someone else's) wife (respectful equivalent of おくさん)
meaning_vi: vợ của người khác (kính ngữ của 奥さん)

meaning_en: anybody (respectful equivalent of だれでも)

kanji: よろしく お伝え ください。
kana: よろしく おつたえ ください。
meaning_en: Give my best regards./Please say hello.
Goodbye. (humble equivalent of しつれいします)

kana: ひまわりしょうがっこう

meaning_vi: nhằm mục tiêu, hướng đến, muốn trở thành

meaning_en: well, then (polite equivalent of じゃ)
have (respectful way of saying もって います)
well, so (indicating an end or beginning)

kana: おおえ けんざぶろう
ノーベルぶんがくしょう
